title: Brevo vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your business needs.
intro: Brevo and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms offering freemium pricing models, but they serve different needs. Brevo positions itself as an all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities, while AWeber focuses on simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs. This comparison helps you decide which platform aligns with your business goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API
comparison_table.tool_b: Autoresponders, RSS-to-email, landing pages, AMP emails
Simple email marketing for content creators

choose_a_if: You need multi-channel marketing (email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) from one platform
You require a built-in CRM and transactional email API capabilities
You want to manage 100,000+ free contacts without upgrading immediately
choose_b_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur wanting straightforward email marketing without extras
You need RSS-to-email and landing page features built-in
You prefer lower entry-level pricing ($15 vs $25 per month)

faq.a: Brevo is better for businesses needing omnichannel marketing and CRM features, while AWeber excels for bloggers and solopreneurs prioritizing simplicity. Your choice depends on whether you need multi-channel capabilities or straightforward email marketing.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber's paid plans start at $15/month compared to Brevo's $25/month, making it cheaper for paid tiers. However, Brevo's free tier allows 100,000 contacts versus AWeber's 500, providing much better value if you stay on the free plan.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and exports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools provide CSV export functionality, which you can then import into Brevo to transfer your subscriber data.
